title: Backtest
description: Simulate your trading strategy over historical sequences.

empty.title: No backtests yet
empty.description: Create your first backtest to start simulating your strategy.

edit.title: Edit backtest
edit.immutableNote: Update the name and optional metadata. Bankroll and eval cost are immutable.

fields.name: Name
fields.strategyPlaceholder: Brief description of the tested strategy…

form.newDescription: Set the initial parameters. The evaluation cost cannot be changed after creation.

tooltips.percentFunded: Share of evaluations that reached funded status.
tooltips.percentPayout: Share of funded accounts that produced at least one payout.
tooltips.percentSuccess: Share of evaluations that ended in a paid funded account — the end-to-end conversion.
tooltips.payoutProbability: Expected payout events per evaluation. Can exceed 100% when funded accounts produce multiple payouts.
tooltips.worstStreak: Longest consecutive run of evaluations without producing a payout.
tooltips.initialBankroll: Starting capital for this backtest. ROI is computed against this number.
tooltips.spentOnEvaluations: Total cost of evaluation attempts: count(E) × eval_cost.
tooltips.totalWithdrawn: Sum of every payout event amount across all funded accounts.
tooltips.medianPayout: Middle value of all payout amounts — resists outliers better than the mean.
tooltips.avgPayoutsPerFunded: Mean number of payout events per funded account: count(P) / count(F).
tooltips.netProfit: Total withdrawn minus spent on evaluations.
tooltips.roi: Net profit / initial bankroll. Measured against the starting capital, not total invested — can exceed 100% when payouts dwarf the initial.
tooltips.currentBankroll: Initial bankroll + net profit. Live capital at this point in the simulation.
